pr.title: Replace Aider with custom agent, reflection loop, and DRM
pr.body:
## Summary

- **Custom agent** (`agent.py`): Streams Ollama responses, parses SEARCH/REPLACE edit blocks, applies them atomically with 3-tier error recovery (exact match → fuzzy retry with error context → whole-file fallback)
- **Task interpreter** (`interpreter.py`): Classifies intent (bug fix, feature, refactor, question), assesses complexity/clarity, decomposes tasks into dependency-ordered steps with topological sort validation
- **Reflection loop** (`reflection.py` + `checker.py`): Maker-checker review cycle where a second model reviews diffs for bugs and logic errors, with auto-triggering based on diff size and deletion ratio
- **Dynamic Resource Manager** (`drm/`): 6-module subsystem for VRAM monitoring via nvidia-smi, model lifecycle management, swap scheduling, OOM detection, and automatic fallback to smaller models
- **18 quality-gap features** implemented from feature scout analysis: edit confidence scoring, context budget tracking, plan templates, structured error categorization, few-shot prompt examples, dynamic token budgets, pre-checker sanity checks, cross-file consistency verification, cascading failure prevention, continuation rounds, misbehavior observer, and more
- **4 rounds of refactoring** (16 fixes): deduplicated shared utilities to `ollama_utils.py`/`console.py`/`log_utils.py`, introduced `StepContext` parameter object, encapsulated DRM state, removed ~170 lines of dead code, extracted magic numbers to named constants
- **Removed Aider dependency** entirely — `aider_session.py` deleted, all references removed
- **Removed tracked `__pycache__/`** files, updated README to reflect new architecture

## Stats
- 32 files changed, ~7,700 insertions, ~265 deletions
- 22 Python modules across `probablyfine/` and `probablyfine/drm/`
- 15 dataclasses in `models.py`

## Test plan
- [x] `python -m py_compile probablyfine/<module>.py` passes for all modules
- [x] `probablyfine` launches, shows TUI with mode/VRAM status bar
- [x] Basic task execution: type a coding task, verify agent streams edits and applies them
- [x] `/reflect on` then run a task — verify checker reviews the diff
- [x] `/drm status` — verify VRAM monitoring output
- [x] `/mode auto` then run a task — verify auto-classification routes correctly
- [x] `/undo` rolls back the last agent checkpoint

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
pr.author: AmberCowled
